## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content publishing, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Publishing issues with new product pages need resolution; 30 pages ready, 30 more by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Considering removal of video content gate; exploring alternative lead capture methods](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [YouTube channel proposed for demo videos to boost SEO rankings](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Site performance: 22 keywords in top 10, generating 20 clicks from 74K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Topics

### Health Update and Personal Anecdotes

  - [Prateek recovering from tonsillitis, triggered by increased ice water consumption](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Troy shared past experiences with throat issues caused by protein shakes before bed](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Discussion on tonsil removal surgery and its benefits](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

### Website Optimization and SEO Efforts

  - [Working on internal linking improvements and heading tag structure fixes](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [New subfolder for video category pages to prevent keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Redirecting product review blog posts to respective product pages](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [15 URLs missed in software alternatives subcategory, to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Content Publishing Challenges

  - [Issue with displaying long-form content behind "Read More" button on product pages](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [\~60 pages of content ready for publishing once technical issues are resolved](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Videos not being indexed due to JavaScript blocking/gating](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Video Content Strategy

  - [Considering removing content gate due to low form completion rate (5,708 out of 162,556 visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Exploring options: non-gated indexable pages + gated navigational pages](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Proposal to publish videos on YouTube channel for additional SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Discussing alternative lead capture methods (pop-ups, feature-gated content)](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

### SEO Performance and Rankings

  - [Recent drop in Google rankings for some product pages (e.g., Copy.ai, Thena, Trumpet)](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Meta title changes may have impacted rankings; considering reverting or optimizing](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Current site performance: 22 keywords in top 10, generating 20 clicks from 74K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Content Strategy and Gamification

  - [183 total articles, with 75 new product review pages pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Suggestion to gamify video access with "Democache" or "Demo Rewards" system](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Resolve webhook issue with Lucas to enable publishing of new product pages](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Decide on video content gating strategy and implement chosen approach](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)

  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/husG9r-23fVwfyfVnswuEch-BVi1us6r?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
